creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
Try to enable avahi now and see, how much crap it's going to bring. I feel kind of losing any hope that this situation will improve with time.

If you willing to chase all the dependency port maintainers to improve overall situation and also if we only could be sure that all the builds are performed in a clean, jailed environment - I'll be more than happy to remove excessive dependencies that are present in the port now cause they'll be automatically linked if are in the system....
